title: Finders Keepers in Stores Now!
excerpt: SO excited that Finders Keepers is making it's way to stores now. WOOHOO! It's been spotted online in several places and don't forget to check with your favorite local paper purveyors as well! Someone recently said on social media somewhere…
body:
SO excited that Finders Keepers is making it's way to stores now. WOOHOO! It's been spotted online in several places and don't forget to check with your favorite local paper purveyors as well! Someone recently said on social media somewhere that they can't wait to get the collection because they don't want to be losers weepers. I thought it was really clever! Can't wait to see what you all make with this collection!

Finders Keepers is available at these fine online retailers: Simon Says Stamp | Blue Moon Scrapbooking | Scrapbook.com
